prompt: A luxury futuristic skincare advertisement in a vertical 4K poster format, centered on a sleek matte-white spray bottle floating diagonally in the middle of the frame, slightly tilted to the right, with a soft cylindrical cap and fine condensation droplets across the upper body. The bottle label reads "SECURE-IP" in clean navy sans-serif text, and below it: "IP ADDRESS CLEANSER" with smaller subtext "for risk-free connections" and "pour des connexions sans risque," plus tiny footer text "75 mL / 2.5 fl. oz. - Data Stream Purifier." Behind the bottle, enormous translucent serif typography fills most of the background, reading "ULTRA-SECURE", split across two lines and partially obscured by the product. The environment is deep midnight blue with glowing translucent fabric-like liquid ribbons curling around the bottle from top left to bottom right and from the lower foreground upward, mixed with 2 prominent glassy tubular arcs and multiple floating crystal-like droplets or bubbles. Lighting is cold, cinematic, glossy, and high-end, with luminous icy blue highlights, soft bloom, refractive reflections, and a pristine premium beauty-campaign look. At the bottom center, elegant spaced-out small caps text reads "ENCRYPTED BARRIER FORMULA". Beneath that is a row of 4 ingredient callouts separated evenly across the width: 1) "CERAMIDE IP-07" with two lines "Strengthens" and "Lipid Defence"; 2) "SQUALANE ENCAPSULES" with "Reinforces" and "Moisture Lock"; 3) "NIACINAMIDE 5%" with "Calms Visible" and "Stress Signals"; 4) "HYALURONIC STACK" with "Multi-Layer" and "Hydration Matrix". At the very bottom center, add a small shield icon and the words "DEFEND. PURIFY. PROTECT." The overall style should blend luxury skincare product photography with cyber-security branding, ultra-polished commercial lighting, shallow depth of field, premium editorial composition, and production-ready ad design.
